3046130.name: LiM Balls - Every Second Counts
3046130.description:
BALLS - Every Second Counts
Do you have what it takes to beat time? Balls is an unique racing experience where you race against time, and if you don't have enough at the final stage you better find it in the previous races.

Simple - Fun - Addictive
Balls is an indie game that captures the simple joy of playing games, but with an added stress level as time is not on your side. At first glance, it's a A to B side-scrolling racing game where you take the roll as a ball. Then the layer of racing against the time is added and makes you replay the stages you now you could have done better.

*具有完全音频支持的语言
